abilities.name: frisk
abilities.shortEffect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals an opposing Pokémon's held item to all participating trainers. In a double battle, if one opponent has an item, this Pokémon will Frisk that Pokémon; if both have an item, it will Frisk one at random.
abilities.flavorText: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.

abilities.name: infiltrator
abilities.shortEffect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves ignore Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.

abilities.name: telepathy
abilities.shortEffect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon does not take damage from friendly Pokémon's moves, including single-target moves aimed at it.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.
